next_steps: Study the worked example: npm install && npx hyperframes preview (8 segments, 3-5 min video essay)
Write SCRIPT.md — one segment per idea, on-screen text separate from VO (see references/VIDEO_PLAYBOOK.md §2)
Confirm DESIGN.md with the user before any HTML (design gate)
Voiceover: edit voiceover/segments.json, then run the skill's scripts/tts.py — or generate VO yourself and drop MP3s into voiceover/
Transcribe every MP3: npx hyperframes transcribe voiceover/<seg>.mp3 (word-level, never skip)
Cues: edit voiceover/cues_spec.json (phrase per scene), run scripts/extract_cues.py — anchor all scene transitions to real times
Build compositions/segN.html mirroring the example's structure; assemble root with 0.6s gaps + alternating tracks
AI images for photographic beats: scripts/gen_image.py out.png 16:9 "prompt"
QA: npx hyperframes lint && validate && inspect --samples 60; extract frames and eyeball
Render: draft first, HQ when frames look right
